evals.prompt: Codex Desktop 刚刚 Sparkle 自动更新了，Fast Mode 又灰了，帮我重新打一下补丁
evals.expected_output: Agent follows the full 6-step workflow: verify not running, backup, discover gates, generate repack.mjs, install + resign, verify config and launch
expectations: Checks that Codex Desktop is not running before proceeding
Creates timestamped backups of app.asar, Info.plist, config.toml
Runs discover.mjs to locate gate files by content pattern
Generates repack.mjs with PATCHES array filled from discovery output
Ensures computer_use=true and service_tier=priority in config.toml

evals.prompt: 我的 Codex 桌面版 Computer Use 功能显示 statsig-disabled，怎么修？macOS 系统
evals.expected_output: Agent recognizes this is the computer-use-gate issue, explains the Statsig gate bypass, and runs the patch workflow
expectations: Identifies the issue as the computer-use-gate Statsig bypass
Explains that Statsig flags gate non-chatgpt users
Does NOT patch the central statsig client module

evals.prompt: re-patch codex after update, also the discovery script found PATTERN_MISMATCH for fastmode-ui — the minified JS changed shape
evals.expected_output: Agent handles the version drift case: extracts the mismatched file, re-analyzes the gate pattern, crafts new find/replace, updates discover.mjs and repack.mjs
expectations: Detects the PATTERN_MISMATCH from discovery output
Extracts the relevant file from the asar for analysis
Reads references/gate-patterns.md to understand the gate's behavioral intent
Crafts new find/replace that achieves the same bypass
Verifies find appears exactly once in the file
Updates both discover.mjs and repack.mjs with the new patterns
